free_text: Inelastic neutron scattering on the Cu-63 And Cu-65
100 cm3 volume, 3.5 keV resolution for Co-60
lines. Calibrated by Eu-152, Ra-226, Cs-137 standard
U-235 ionization chamber for neutron flux.
Natural Cu. Cylinder of 18mm diameter, 30 mm height,
85.5g mass,placed at 100mm distance from neutron source
Ref. of INDC(CCP) report was added.
BIB information was updated in MONITOR,DETECTOR,STATUS.
